rewritten_requirements: The system shall maintain the date at which specific parts of a car are installed.
The system shall notify the expiry dates of car parts to both the driver and authorized service centre.
The system shall enable car owners and service centres to separately login and enter their cars' information.
The system shall allow a service centre employee to enter estimated expiry dates of parts of the car after issuing the car.
The system shall notify car owners and service centres when the expiry date for parts of the car is reached.
The system shall enable a service centre employee to contact the owner about a service request after notification.
The system shall allow an owner to select damaged parts to be serviced through the app.
The system shall enable a service centre employee to update information about changed parts in the app.
The system shall allow online payment for services through the app.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Maintain the date at which specific parts of a car are installed
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This application maintains the date at which the specific part of a car is installed

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Notify expiry dates of car parts to both driver and authorized service centre
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: notifies the expiry date of the parts of the car for both the driver and authorized service centre

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable car owners and service centres to separately login and enter their cars' information
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This application enables car owners and service centres to separately login and enter their cars information

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow service centre employee to enter estimated expiry dates of parts of the car after issuing the car
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: the service centre employee enters the estimated expiry dates of parts of the car in this app

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Notify car owners and service centres when expiry date for parts of the car is reached
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This application notifies the car owners and service centres when the expiry date for parts of the car is reached

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable service centre employee to contact owner about service request after notification
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Then the service centre employee contacts the owner of a car about service, once the owner accepts service request

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow owner to select damaged parts to be serviced through app
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: once the owner selects the damaged parts to be serviced, the employee services the owner selected parts

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable service centre employee to update information about changed parts in app
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: the employee updates the information about changed parts in the app so that the car can be service again on the expiry date of changed parts

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow online payment for services through app
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This application also enables the online payment for the services (Figures 14.1–14.8)
